read-hooks.command: input=$(cat); path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$path" | grep -qE '(^|/)\.env$'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"BLOCKED: .env files contain secrets. Use environment variables or ask the user to provide values."}}' && exit 0; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$path" | grep -qE '(^|/)\.env\.'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"BLOCKED: .env files contain secrets."}}' && exit 0; fi; exit 0

bash-hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|]\s*)security\s+find-generic-password'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"BLOCKED: macOS Keychain access. Ask the user to provide the credential instead."}}' && exit 0; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|]\s*)security\s+find-internet-password'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"BLOCKED: macOS Keychain access. Ask the user to provide the credential instead."}}' && exit 0; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|]\s*)security\s+dump-keychain'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"BLOCKED: macOS Keychain dump. Ask the user to provide the credential instead."}}' && exit 0; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|]\s*)az\s+account\s+get-access-token'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"BLOCKED: Azure CLI token extraction. Use DefaultAzureCredential in code instead."}}' && exit 0; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|]\s*)aws\s+sts\s+get-session-token'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"BLOCKED: AWS STS token extraction. Use environment variables or IAM roles."}}' && exit 0; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|]\s*)gcloud\s+auth\s+print-(access|identity)-token'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"BLOCKED: GCloud token extraction. Use application default credentials in code."}}' && exit 0; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|]\s*)printenv'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"BLOCKED: printenv dumps all environment variables including secrets."}}' && exit 0; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|]\s*)keyring\s+get'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"BLOCKED: Linux keyring access. Ask the user to provide the credential instead."}}' && exit 0; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|]\s*)secret-tool\s+lookup'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"BLOCKED: Linux secret-tool access. Ask the user to provide the credential instead."}}' && exit 0; fi; exit 0
